title: pagaea recurva
intro: Pagaea recurva, also known as the curved pagoda or Pagoda flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Pagaea recurva include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
